title: Inverse Trigonometric Functions
statement:
- $\arcsin : [-1,1] \to [-\pi/2, \pi/2]$ is the inverse of
 $\sin\big|_{[-\pi/2,\pi/2]}$.
- $\arccos : [-1,1] \to [0,\pi]$ is the inverse of
 $\cos\big|_{[0,\pi]}$.
- $\arctan : \mathbb{R} \to (-\pi/2, \pi/2)$ is the inverse
 of $\tan\big|_{(-\pi/2,\pi/2)}$.
